_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Test and evaluate locally developed tools for operational use.
reference_document_element_description: Translate research findings into production-applicable methods, working with engineering teams to operationalize novel approaches.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI LS domain. LS-T-004 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: OP-T-010 (OP, cosine: 0.480), OP-S-008 (OP, cosine: 0.467).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.1/10 (raw 0.509). No substantive shared vocabulary — relationship is purely semantic. DCWF-only terms [developed, evaluate, locally, operational, test, tools] vs WIDAI-only terms [applicable, approaches, engineering, findings, methods, novel] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.879 (P=0.887, R=0.871). Balanced P/R — the 9-word DCWF element and 14-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.7%). "Test and evaluate locally developed tools for operational use." and "Translate research findings into production-applicable methods, working with eng" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.493 ≈ STS 0.509 (gap 0.016). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [none] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 0.0%. Zero substantive shared tokens. The entire relationship is semantic — no lexical trace. DCWF terms: [developed, evaluate, locally, operational, test, tools]. WIDAI terms: [applicable, approaches, engineering, findings, methods, novel].
